title: Adorable Sinner
writer: Charles Spaak, Princesse Bibesco, Georges Neveux
actors: Romy Schneider, Curd Jürgens, Pierre Blanchar
plot: Czar Alexander II meets a schoolgirl called Katia. Realizing that he loves her, he attempts to push her away but to no avail. She becomes his mistress. With Katia's help, Alexander is working on a liberal constitution.
